name: Mintlify API
description: Mintlify REST API for documentation management, AI assistant integration, agent-powered documentation editing, deployment management, and analytics. Provides endpoints for triggering deployments, managing AI agent jobs, querying documentation via AI assistant, searching docs, and retrieving analytics data.
